description: Finish engineering onboarding modules and pass the secure coding assessment.
Own and ship a minor product enhancement to production with peer review.
Present completed work and customer impact during the team sprint review.
Generate and maintain a qualified sales pipeline worth 3x monthly target.
Keep opportunity stages, notes, and next steps updated weekly in CRM.
Plan and launch an email nurture campaign with measurable engagement goals.
Create a recurring performance report summarizing funnel and content metrics.
Automate the month-end variance report and reduce manual processing time.
Support the finance manager in improving weekly forecast accuracy.
Standardize operating procedures for the new joiner onboarding checklist.
Improve communication between operations and support to reduce ticket lag.
Create a reusable escalation playbook for recurring operational incidents.
